theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

verdicts.name: Super Micro
verdicts.note: AI 서버 OEM, NVDA 출하 직접 지표
verdicts.label: ACCUMULATE

narrative.summary: Super Micro: 정량 종합 72점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 62 / 중기 74 / 장기 78. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 약과열
overheat.guidance: 분할매수만. 한 번에 들어가지 말고 1/3~1/2씩 나눠서.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 6.1% → 2-ATR 손절폭 12.2%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 1개 시그널 합류 — 주봉 50MA. 현재가 대비 +0.7% 위치. T1 $39.34 (R:R 0.4)
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $37.93 아래 손절가 $34.42 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

top_news.title: Google Engineer Charged With Insider Trading on Polymarket
top_news.summary: A Google software engineer was charged with insider trading on Polymarket, where he allegedly made more than $1 million betting on one of last year’s most popular Internet searches.

top_news.title: Oil Gains as Deal to End War and Reopen Hormuz Remains Elusive
top_news.summary: Oil edged higher as the US and Iran remained at odds over how to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, with the war entering its fourth month.

top_news.title: Stocks in Asia to Slip on Mixed US-Iran Signals: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Asian stocks were set to edge lower, while oil gained as investors weighed conflicting signals over prospects for a deal to end the war in Iran and restore energy flows through the crucial Strait of Hormuz.

top_news.title: Synopsys Settles with Elliott, Names Firm’s Jesse Cohn to Board
top_news.summary: Synopsys Inc. said it has reached an agreement with Elliott Investment Management and is appointing the activist investor’s Jesse Cohn to the chip-design software maker’s board.

top_news.title: PacSun 'Co-Creating' Brand to Reach Gen Z
top_news.summary: PacSun CEO Brieane Olson said that the retailer has built a resurgence by 'co-creating' and listening to a live feedback loop of what Gen Z consumers want to see from the retailer instead of treating young people like a static audience. She said brands have to shit the notion of control and relinquish it some to gain more 'brand and community trust.' (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Stock Rally Falters on Conflicting US-Iran Signals: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Wall Street traders left stocks wavering amid mixed signals about prospects for a deal to end the war in Iran and revive energy flows through the vital Strait of Hormuz.

top_news.title: Traders See Conflicting Iran Signals on US-Iran Deal
top_news.summary: Eric Weiner, Bloomberg News senior editor for equities Americas and Sarah Hunt, chief market strategist at Alpine Saxon Woods, break down muted market reaction to Iran peace negotiations as oil remains high with the future of MidEast shipping lanes uncertain.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Peru Extends Halt on Anchovy Fishing as El Niño Threat Looms
top_news.summary: Peru has extended a halt on anchovy fishing due to a warming of the Pacific waters off the country’s coast, as the threat of a weather-roiling El Niño looms.

top_news.title: BlackRock's Rosenberg on Fed Rates, IALT ETF Strategy
top_news.summary: Jeffrey Rosenberg, portfolio manager of the iShares Systematic Alternatives Active ETF (IALT) at BlackRock, explains how the ETF is navigating the current economic environment on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: KKR’s Nuttall Says Trading Private Credit Is ‘Likely to Happen’
top_news.summary: KKR & Co.’s co-chief executive officer Scott Nuttall said it was likely that the alternative asset manager would eventually start trading private credit, following early efforts by Apollo Global Management Inc. to create a market for less liquid debt.
